zh.Ystrad Alun cmt, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾育斯特拉德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ap Cynwrig於大約1187年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾育斯特拉德時，他的父親Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl51歲，母親Goleu ferch Gruffudd49歲。他和Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Ystrad Alun cmt, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾育斯特拉德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn ap Cynwrig于大约1187年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾育斯特拉德时，他的父亲Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl51岁，母亲Goleu ferch Gruffudd49岁。他和Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ap Cynwrig was born about 1187, in Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, was 51 and his mother, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, was 49. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn ap Cynwrig est né environ 1187, à Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, avait 49 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn ap Cynwrig um 1187 in Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl 51 und seine Mutter Goleu ferch Gruffudd 49. Er hatte mit Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

ht.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig è nato il circa 1187 nel Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, aveva 49 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.

ja.Ystrad Alun cmt, Flintshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアイストラド
ja.Flintshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Cynwrigが約1187年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアイストラドで生まれた時，父Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwyseglは51歳，母Goleu ferch Gruffuddは49歳であった。彼はMrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrigとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Cynwrig(이)가 대략 1187년 웨일스 카마테실르 이스트래드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Goleu ferch Gruffudd(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, tinha 49 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ap Cynwrig родился около 1187 г. в местности истрад, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Goleu ferch Gruffudd, 49. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig nació aproximadamente 1187, en Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, tenía 49 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Mrs. Llywelyn ap Cynwrig.
